data.name: Apple Juice (1000ml)
data.description: The all-time classic.

data.name: Apple Pomace
data.description: Finest pressings of apples. Allergy disclaimer: Might contain traces of worms. Can be sent back to us for recycling.

data.name: Banana Juice (1000ml)
data.description: Monkeys love it the most.

data.name: Basil Smoothie
data.description: A unique blend of fresh basil and ginger for a healthy kick.

data.name: Berry Juice (1000ml)
data.description: A delicious blend of fresh forest berries.

data.name: Best Juice Shop Salesman Artwork
data.description: Unique digital painting depicting Stan, our most qualified and almost profitable salesman. He made a succesful carreer in selling used ships, coffins, krypts, crosses, real estate, life insurance, restaurant supplies, voodoo enhanced asbestos and courtroom souvenirs before finally adding his expertise to the Juice Shop marketing team.

data.name: Bragă (500ml)
data.description: Traditional Balkan drink made from fermented millet. Lightly sweet-sour, refreshing, and naturally energizing.

data.name: Carrot Juice (1000ml)
data.description: As the old German saying goes: "Carrots are good for the eyes. Or has anyone ever seen a rabbit with glasses?"

data.name: Dragonfruit Juice (500ml)
data.description: Exotic and vibrant juice made from dragonfruit.

data.name: Eggfruit Juice (500ml)
data.description: Now with even more exotic flavour.

data.name: Elderflower Cordial (500ml)
data.description: Floral and fragrant soft drink made from elderflowers. Traditionally enjoyed chilled.

data.name: Fruit Press
data.description: Fruits go in. Juice comes out. Pomace you can send back to us for recycling purposes.

data.name: Grape Juice (1000ml)
data.description: Deep purple and full of antioxidants from selected grapes.

data.name: Green Smoothie
data.description: Looks poisonous but is actually very good for your health! Made from green cabbage, spinach, kiwi and grass.

data.name: Juice Shop "Permafrost" 2020 Edition
data.description: Exact version of OWASP Juice Shop that was archived on 02/02/2020 by the GitHub Archive Program and ultimately went into the Arctic Code Vault on July 8. 2020 where it will be safely stored for at least 1000 years.

data.name: Lemon Juice (500ml)
data.description: Sour but full of vitamins.

data.name: Melon Bike (Comeback-Product 2018 Edition)
data.description: The wheels of this bicycle are made from real water melons. You might not want to ride it up/down the curb too hard.

data.name: Melon Juice (1000ml)
data.description: Refreshing and sweet juice made from ripe melons.

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop "King of the Hill" Facemask
data.description: Facemask with compartment for filter from 50% cotton and 50% polyester.

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop CTF Girlie-Shirt
data.description: For serious Capture-the-Flag heroines only!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Card (non-foil)
data.description: Mythic rare (obviously...) card "OWASP Juice Shop" with three distinctly useful abilities. Alpha printing, mint condition. A true collectors piece to own!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Coaster (10pcs)
data.description: Our 95mm circle coasters are printed in full color and made from thick, premium coaster board.

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Holographic Sticker
data.description: Die-cut holographic sticker. Stand out from those 08/15-sticker-covered laptops with this shiny beacon of 80's coolness!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Hoodie
data.description: Mr. Robot-style apparel. But in black. And with logo.

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Iron-Ons (16pcs)
data.description: Upgrade your clothes with washer safe iron-ons of the OWASP Juice Shop or CTF Extension logo!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop LEGO™ Tower
data.description: Want to host a Juice Shop CTF in style? Build your own LEGO™ tower which holds four Raspberry Pi 4 models with PoE HAT modules running a MultiJuicer Kubernetes cluster! Wire to a switch and connect to your network to have an out-of-the-box ready CTF up in no time!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Logo (3D-printed)
data.description: This rare item was designed and handcrafted in Sweden. This is why it is so incredibly expensive despite its complete lack of purpose.

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Magnets (16pcs)
data.description: Your fridge will be even cooler with these OWASP Juice Shop or CTF Extension logo magnets!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Mug
data.description: Black mug with regular logo on one side and CTF logo on the other! Your colleagues will envy you!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Sticker Page
data.description: Massive decoration opportunities with these OWASP Juice Shop or CTF Extension sticker pages! Each page has 16 stickers on it.

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Sticker Single
data.description: Super high-quality vinyl sticker single with the OWASP Juice Shop or CTF Extension logo! The ultimate laptop decal!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop T-Shirt
data.description: Real fans wear it 24/7!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop Temporary Tattoos (16pcs)
data.description: Get one of these temporary tattoos to proudly wear the OWASP Juice Shop or CTF Extension logo on your skin! If you tweet a photo of yourself with the tattoo, you get a couple of our stickers for free! Please mention @owasp_juiceshop in your tweet!

data.name: OWASP Juice Shop-CTF Velcro Patch
data.description: 4x3.5" embroidered patch with velcro backside. The ultimate decal for every tactical bag or backpack!

data.name: OWASP SSL Advanced Forensic Tool (O-Saft)
data.description: O-Saft is an easy to use tool to show information about SSL certificate and tests the SSL connection according given list of ciphers and various SSL configurations. More...

data.name: OWASP Snakes and Ladders - Mobile Apps
data.description: This amazing mobile app security awareness board game is available for Tabletop Simulator on Steam Workshop now!

data.name: OWASP Snakes and Ladders - Web Applications
data.description: This amazing web application security awareness board game is available for Tabletop Simulator on Steam Workshop now!

data.name: Orange Juice (1000ml)
data.description: Made from oranges hand-picked by Uncle Dittmeyer.

data.name: Pineapple Juice (1000ml)
data.description: Tropical refreshment from the finest sun-ripened pineapples.

data.name: Pomegranate Drink (500ml)
data.description: A sweet and tart refreshment inspired by classic grenadine flavors.

data.name: Pwning OWASP Juice Shop
data.description: The official Companion Guide by Björn Kimminich available for free on LeanPub and also readable online!

data.name: Quince Juice (1000ml)
data.description: Juice of the Cydonia oblonga fruit. Not exactly sweet but rich in Vitamin C.

data.name: Raspberry Juice (1000ml)
data.description: Made from blended Raspberry Pi, water and sugar.

data.name: Sea Buckthorn Juice (500ml)
data.description: Tangy and slightly sour juice, extremely rich in Vitamin C and antioxidants.

data.name: Strawberry Juice (500ml)
data.description: Sweet & tasty!

data.name: Woodruff Syrup "Forest Master X-Treme"
data.description: Harvested and manufactured in the Black Forest, Germany. Can cause hyperactive behavior in children. Can cause permanent green tongue when consumed undiluted.
